hero:
# Sports Analytics Dashboard

**Player performance modeling & valuation · Python · Pandas · Scikit-learn · Dash · GCP**

## Hero Overview

A personal/academic sports-analytics prototype: a soccer player-performance dashboard scaling a reusable cleaning pipeline to 100K+ datapoints across 22 attributes, and a cross-sport (FIFA × NBA) player-valuation model benchmarking 25K+ records over 5 seasons.

Both ship as interactive Dash/Plotly apps on a temporary GCP deployment, turning raw player data into model-backed comparison views and R²-based valuation/pricing exploration.

points.evidence: Reusable normalization pipeline scaling to 100K+ player datapoints, enabling re-runs against new seasons without manual rework.
Engineered 22 soccer attributes and 20+ cross-sport features with Pandas/Scikit-learn, applying PCA to lift model interpretability.
Multivariate Linear Regression reaching ~85% R² on market-value prediction, with R²-based performance projection.
Integrated 25K+ FIFA records across 5 seasons with NBA OBPM/DBPM metrics into one valuation-benchmarking dataset.
Interactive time-series dashboards on Dash and Plotly with a temporary GCP deployment, replacing static spreadsheet workflows with model-backed comparison views.

storyline:
# Storyline

## Context

Comparing player performance across seasons and leagues is slow in static spreadsheets that bury the underlying signal — this personal/academic prototype explores a model-backed alternative.

## Workflow

Raw player data → reusable cleaning & integrity testing → feature engineering → regression modeling → interactive dashboards for comparison and valuation. The same pipeline backs both the soccer dashboard and the FIFA × NBA cross-sport valuation model.

## Technical Implementation

- **Cleaning pipeline:** reusable normalization (IQR outlier removal, Z-score, Kolmogorov-Smirnov testing) scaling to 100K+ datapoints across 22 attributes, re-runnable against new seasons.
- **Feature engineering:** 20+ statistical and contextual features with Pandas and Scikit-learn, PCA applied to reduce dimensionality and lift interpretability.
- **Modeling:** Multivariate Linear Regression reaching ~85% R² on market-value prediction, with R²-based performance projection.
- **Cross-sport benchmarking:** integrated 25K+ FIFA records across 5 seasons with NBA OBPM/DBPM metrics into one valuation dataset.
- **Dashboards:** interactive time-series Dash/Plotly apps on a temporary GCP deployment for side-by-side player comparison.

## Outcomes

Produced a prototype that turns 22-attribute player data into model-backed comparison views and R²-based valuation/pricing exploration, deployed temporarily on GCP as a personal/academic build.
